ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "square_meters" REAL /* Square meters of the room */,
  "theater_capacity" INTEGER /* Theater-style seating capacity of the room */,
  "cabaret_capacity" INTEGER /* Cabaret-style seating capacity of the room */,
  "cocktail_capacity" INTEGER /* Cocktail-style seating capacity of the room */,
  "symposium_capacity" INTEGER /* Symposium-style seating capacity of the room */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the room */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., conference room, banquet hall) */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the room (e.g., available, booked, maintenance) */,
  "price_per_square_meter" REAL /* Price per square meter for different configurations */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the room (e.g., projector, sound system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., wedding, conference, party) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room booked for the event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who booked the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer (event planner) */,
  "expected_guests" INTEGER /* Expected number of guests */,
  "actual_guests" INTEGER /* Actual number of guests (for reporting) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the booking */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room associated with the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the booking */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer (event planner) */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking (e.g., unpaid, partially paid, fully paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., event planner, administrator, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user (e.g., can_book, can_cancel, can_view_reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_amenities" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id", "room_id")
)
